tasks.title: Module framework: the seven adapter-surface interfaces + capability-scoped registry (INV-17/18)

scenarios: An unregistered or disabled module has no execution path
Each surface admits exactly one registered implementation per source type

tasks.title: modules/ingest/librenms: loadable LibreNMS ingest module (NL + GR config rows behind one impl)

scenarios: The LibreNMS ingest module loads and normalizes a device-down alert

tasks.title: modules/ingest/prometheus-alertmanager: loadable Prometheus/Alertmanager ingest module

scenarios: The Prometheus Alertmanager ingest module loads and correlates a firing-then-resolved alert

tasks.title: modules/ingest/crowdsec: loadable CrowdSec ingest module

scenarios: The CrowdSec ingest module loads and normalizes a decision event

tasks.title: modules/tracker/youtrack: loadable YouTrack tracker module (trigger + audit sink)

scenarios: The YouTrack tracker module loads and drives the trigger and audit sink

tasks.title: modules/tracker/jira: reference Jira tracker module behind the tracker interface

scenarios: The Jira tracker module loads behind the tracker interface

tasks.title: modules/tracker/github-issues: reference GitHub Issues tracker module

scenarios: The GitHub Issues tracker module loads behind the tracker interface

tasks.title: modules/tracker/servicenow: reference ServiceNow tracker module

scenarios: The ServiceNow tracker module loads behind the tracker interface

tasks.title: modules/actuation/ssh: gated argv-only mutating path + reversible-op allowlist (mutation stays off, task #21)

scenarios: The SSH actuation module keeps its gated mutating path inert while mutation is off

tasks.title: modules/observability/syslogng: read-only syslog-ng investigation connector (get-host-logs + search-host-logs, argv-only over SSH)

scenarios: The syslog-ng investigation connector returns a host's recent logs over a fixed argv SSH read
The syslog-ng investigation connector refuses a path-traversal host and never reads a file
